hooks.command: command_input=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty') && for pattern in 'rm -rf /' 'rm -rf ~' 'rm -rf \.' 'mkfs\.' ':(){' 'chmod -R 777' 'chmod 777 /' '> /dev/sd' 'dd if=' 'git push' 'git push --force' 'git reset --hard' 'git clean -fd' 'git clean -fx' 'git checkout -- \.' 'git restore \.' '\| sh$' '\| bash$' 'curl.*\| sh' 'wget.*\| sh' 'curl.*\| bash' 'wget.*\| bash' 'npm publish' 'npx.*-y' 'pip install.*--break-system' 'sudo ' 'shutdown' 'reboot' 'init 0' 'init 6'; do if echo "$command_input" | grep -qE "$pattern"; then echo "BLOCKED: Command matches dangerous pattern: $pattern" >&2; exit 2; fi; done
